evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-24 bounded live same-domain education leaf probes across 53 saved Ohio district or ESC roots. Exact local education leaves now verify strong county-grade routing for 45 counties and partial local routing for 23 more counties, but 20 counties still point to dead, unresolvable, transport-broken, or no-leaf roots (brown-oh => https://www.brown.k12.oh.us; clermont-oh => https://www.ccesc.org; columbiana-oh => https://www.ccesc.k12.oh.us; darke-oh => https://www.darkeesc.org; erie-oh => https://www.npesc.org/vnews/display.v/SEC/Member%20%26%20Partner%20School%20Districts; fairfield-oh => https://www.fairfieldesc.org; gallia-oh => https://www.gvesc.org; huron-oh => https://www.npesc.org/vnews/display.v/SEC/Member%20%26%20Partner%20School%20Districts; lawrence-oh => https://www.lawrenceesc.org; logan-oh => https://www.mesc.k12.oh.us; medina-oh => https://www.medina-esc.org; mercer-oh => https://www.merceresc.org; …).
